title: RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: The jet experienced a flight control issue and landed safely at Lossiemouth in Moray.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight A fighter jet declared a mid-air emergency while over Scotland, the RAF has said.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The Typhoon, which had been operating out of RAF Lossiemouth in Moray, encountered a flight control issue at about 12:20. It is understood the Typhoon was on a routine training flight.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – RAF Typhoon declares mid-air emergency during training flight
